Poker Hand #SG3001: Tournament #100000001, Spin & Gold $5 Hold'em No Limit - Level1(10/20) - 2026/06/01 12:00:00
Table '100000001 1' 3-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: Hero (500 in chips)
Seat 2: a1b2c3 (500 in chips)
Seat 3: d4e5f6 (500 in chips)
a1b2c3: posts small blind 10
d4e5f6: posts big blind 20
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [Ah Kd]
Hero: raises 40 to 60
a1b2c3: folds
d4e5f6: calls 40
*** FLOP *** [Ts 7h 2c]
d4e5f6: checks
Hero: bets 80
d4e5f6: folds
Hero collected 140 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot 140 | Rake 0
Board [Ts 7h 2c]

Seat 1: Hero (560 in chips)
Seat 2: a1b2c3 (470 in chips)
Seat 3: d4e5f6 (470 in chips)
d4e5f6: posts small blind 10
Hero: posts big blind 20
*** HOLE CARDS ***

a1b2c3: raises 40 to 60
d4e5f6: folds
Hero: raises 120 to 180
